## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Keep it short. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My change does not introduce write actions to Reddit (vote, post, comment, mod).
- [ ] My change does not introduce user tracking or telemetry.
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally.
- [ ] `cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug` succeeds locally.
- [ ] I have updated [`CHANGELOG.md`](../blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) under `[Unreleased]` if relevant.
- [ ] I have updated documentation if behavior changed.
